'''gashocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squanderation|squanderation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-sh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squanderation|squanderation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gashocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæshecheth|gæshecheth]] || [[word:gæshechej|gæshechej]] || [[word:gæshechesh|gæshechesh]] || [[word:gæsheche|gæsheche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gashoshochoth|gashoshochoth]] || [[word:gashoshochoj|gashoshochoj]] || [[word:gashoshochosh|gashoshochosh]] || [[word:gashoshocho|gashoshocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gashochoth|gashochoth]] || [[word:gashochoj|gashochoj]] || [[word:gashochosh|gashochosh]] || [[word:gashocho|gashocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gashofchofth|gashofchofth]] || [[word:gashofchofj|gashofchofj]] || [[word:gashofchofsh|gashofchofsh]] || [[word:gashofchof|gashofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gashochotho|gashochotho]] || [[word:gashochojo|gashochojo]] || [[word:gashochosho|gashochosho]] || [[word:gashochoko|gashochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gashochoth|gashochoth]] || [[word:gashochoj|gashochoj]] || [[word:gashochosh|gashochosh]] || [[word:gashocho|gashocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gashochothol|gashochothol]] || [[word:gashochojol|gashochojol]] || [[word:gashochoshol|gashochoshol]] || [[word:gashochokol|gashochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gashochoothotho|gashochoothotho]] || [[word:gashochoojojo|gashochoojojo]] || [[word:gashochooshosho|gashochooshosho]] || [[word:gashochooko|gashochooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gashochothon|gashochothon]] || [[word:gashochojon|gashochojon]] || [[word:gashochoshon|gashochoshon]] || [[word:gashochokon|gashochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gashochothooro|gashochothooro]] || [[word:gashochojooro|gashochojooro]] || [[word:gashochoshooro|gashochoshooro]] || [[word:gashochokooro|gashochokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
